tags.name: South Korean Baby Abalone with Hot Mayo Miso Sauce

metaData.Key Information:
•Being a trusted brand for many years, Lady's Choice has been committed to providing consumers with the quality and superior-tasting products.
• Lady’s Choice champions the return of the family to real food from the convenience of instant and artificial junk, which is why our product range are made from the finest ingredients to bring out the best taste of real food.
•

metaData.Ingredients:
Rapeseed Oil 68%, Water, Pasteurized Egg Yolk* 5%, Spirit Vinegar, Sugar, Starch, Salt, Mustard Seeds, Spices, Antioxidant (Calcium Disodium EDTA)
*From Free Range Eggs
metaData.Key Information: The best ketchup, the best salad cream and now our best mayonnaise. We have applied all our expertise to develop our best ever mayonnaise to go with everyday foods like sandwiches, salads, jacket potatoes or chips.
metaData.Preparation:
• Squeeze desirable amount onto salads, burgers, hotdogs, any western cuisine
• Suitable as dipping sauce for nugguts, fries, appetisers, etc

product.description: Heinz mayonnaise is seriously rich, creamy and smooth Made using only quality ingredients ...and only ever using free range eggs [Seriously] Creamy, [Seriously] Good. We don't take ourselves too seriously - but when it comes to our mayo, it's a whole different story. Rich, creamy and irresistibly smooth, we're serious about it all... because that's how you make it [Seriously] Good. We only use 100% free range eggs and quality ingredients, to make a difference that you can taste in every spoonful. With absolutely no artificial colours, flavours or thickeners, our best ever mayonnaise pairs perfectly with everyday foods like sandwiches, salads and chips. We hope you love it just as much as we do.

metaData.Ingredients: Rapeseed oil 68%, water, pasteurized egg yolk 5%, spirit vinegar, sugar, starch, salt, mustard seeds, spices, antioxidant (calcium disodium EDTA).
metaData.Storage Information: For Best Results, Refrigerate After Opening

product.name: Heinz Seriously Good Mayonnaise

metaData.Ingredients: Rapeseed Oil, Water, Pasteurised Egg Yolk, Spirit Vinegar, Sugar, Starch, Salt, Mustard Seeds, Spices, Antioxidant (Calcium Disodium EDTA)
metaData.Key Information:
• Made with free range egg
• Contains absolutely no added colours, flavours or artificial thickeners
metaData.Preparation: Add on to your cuisine as desired
metaData.Storage Information: After opening refrigerate and eat within 6 weeks

product.description: We’ve infused our smooth and creamy mayo with rich truffle to effortlessly perk up your meals. Heinz Truffle Mayonnaise adds a delicious touch of indulgence to the humble cheese toastie or ham sandwich, or why not add a dollop to a juicy chargrilled steak for an unforgettable taste experience?

metaData.Ingredients: Sunflower Oil (68%), Water, Pasteurised Free Range EGG Yolk* (5%), Spirit Vinegar, Onion, Sugar, Starch, Garlic, Molasses, Salt, Wine Vinegar, Truffles (Tuber Aestivum Vitt) (0.4%), Flavouring, Dried Mushrooms (0.2%), Natural Flavouring, Pepper, Antioxidant (Calcium Disodium EDTA).
metaData.Key Information:
The Truffle Mayo delivers an indulgent, earthy flavour that adds a gourmet touch to chips, grilled vegetables, and gourmet sandwiches.
Made with 100% Free Range Eggs.
No Artificial Colours or Thickeners
Suitable for Vegetarians
Lactose Free
metaData.Storage Information: For Best Results, Refrigerate After Opening

product.name: Heinz Mayonnaise - Rich & Creamy Truffle

• Allergen advice: contains eggs and soy
